plugins.name: Achievements
plugins.description: Unlock viewing badges for plays, pulses, favorites, ratings, and stories.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Initial achievements plugin with in-app viewing milestones.

plugins.name: AI
plugins.description: Shared Venice API credentials, chat model, image model, and text-to-speech defaults for CherryBox plugins.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Drop IAiImageService interface reference so plugins load on hosts without that shared type.

plugins.name: Backup
plugins.description: Backup and restore settings, databases, and configuration.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Self-contained Backup settings tab with HTML UI in the plugin web folder.

plugins.name: Video downloader
plugins.description: Queue and download videos with yt-dlp, with library scan and metadata lookup. Built-in Pornhub GIF support; image sites via the Image downloader add-on.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Fix download covers and WebM GIF handling; improve plugin UI message contrast.

plugins.name: Email
plugins.description: Shared SMTP settings and email delivery for CherryBox plugins.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Per-send From display name override; inline cid: attachments with Content-Disposition inline.

plugins.name: Image downloader
plugins.description: Download images and galleries from supported sites into Pictures or Galleries libraries.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Fix download cover routing and WebM GIF handling.

plugins.name: Newsletter
plugins.description: Welcome emails on signup and weekly digests with new items plus hand-picked recommendations. Candy Cherry and Maxxx Cherry write intimate AI intros using performers, studios, and tags.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Intimate friend/lover weekly copy with performer callouts, metadata-rich AI prompts, and a recommendations section.

plugins.name: Password reset
plugins.description: Send password reset links when users forget their password. Requires the Email plugin.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Split SMTP into Email plugin; reset settings now cover tokens and public URL only.

plugins.name: Social
plugins.description: Comments, likes, dislikes, friends, messaging, and public profile likes.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Initial social plugin with messaging, friends, and media engagement.

plugins.name: Story covers
plugins.description: Generate AI book-cover artwork for stories from story text, with title and author on the cover. Copies artwork to linked audio.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Resolve AI image generation via reflection for compatibility with older host abstractions.

plugins.name: Story site importers
plugins.description: Import stories from Reddit, Literotica, LushStories, SexStories, SexStories69, and StoriesOnline.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Story import plugin for supported external sites.

plugins.name: Story text-to-speech
plugins.description: Convert .love story files to audio using the AI plugin, save to your audio library, and auto-link when complete.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Split Venice AI settings into the AI plugin; this plugin now handles the TTS queue only.

plugins.name: Media transcoder
plugins.description: Standardize video files in-place with configurable profiles, library assignments, and a 24/7 background transcode queue.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Fix TranscodeApi load order on plugin settings pages.

plugins.name: View time limits
plugins.description: Limit viewing minutes, account expiry, auto-replenishment, and minute requests.
plugins.author: CherryBox
plugins.changelog: Move account advanced time management into a plugin settings tab.
